# SOLAR Feature Requests

Improvement ideas and enhancement requests captured during task execution. Used as
input to the Compound Review process and SOLAR-Ralph version planning.

## How to Use

When an agent observes a behavioural gap, missing capability, or friction point that
warrants a future improvement, record it here:

```
### [DATE] [PRIORITY: low|medium|high] — [SHORT TITLE]
**Observed Gap:** <what is missing or sub-optimal>
**Context:** <what triggered this observation>
**Proposed Solution:** <rough idea of how to address it>
**Effort Estimate:** <low|medium|high>
**Blocking?:** <yes|no — does this block a current workflow?>
```

Items are reviewed during Compound Review (`/solar-compound-review`). High-priority
blocking items should be escalated to the next SOLAR version planning cycle.
